label: Harness writes NO graph-metadata.json — zero occurrences in harness file
evidence: mjs:20-31 — harness writes SUMMARY_TSV, stderr logs only
mjs:477 — writes workload.json (scenario 410 only)
mjs:668 — writes SUMMARY_TSV
grep graph-metadata in harness returns only the comment at mjs:708-711 warning that a scan WOULD rewrite graph-metadata but harness intentionally does not enable it

label: Harness child daemon exits BEFORE buildIfNeeded when operator owner lease is live — no INDEX scan possible
evidence: cjs:850 — acquireOwnerLeaseFile() returns acquired:false when live owner holds lease
cjs:851-864 — !acquired branch logs liveOwnerDetected, calls bridgeOrReportLeaseHeld, RETURNS at cjs:864
cjs:944 — buildIfNeeded(actions) only reached AFTER cjs:864 return is bypassed
cjs:867-872 — second exit-before-scan path if isLeaseHeld() returns held:true

label: Only operator's own maintainer-mode daemon writes graph-metadata.json — harness does not set SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE
evidence: cjs:80 — MAINTAINER_MODE=true forces all 5 INDEX_* flags to true
cjs:4 — launcher comment: 'INDEX_* override when SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE=true'
mjs:708-711 — harness comment: 'Maintainer mode is intentionally NOT enabled: a forced INDEX_* full scan would rewrite graph-metadata across the tree'
mjs:697,719 — harness passes SPECKIT_LAUNCHER_BRIDGE_DISABLED but NOT MAINTAINER_MODE

label: Harness indirect triggering of operator daemon graph-metadata writes is implausible — harness writes only to _sandbox/ outside INDEX scan scope
evidence: mjs:13-15 — SANDBOX_EVIDENCE_DIR is _sandbox/24--local-llm-query-intelligence/evidence
mjs:476 — workload.json written to _sandbox/.../410/
cjs:82-86 — INDEX scan targets ONLY .opencode/{skills,specs,agents,commands,plugins} — NOT _sandbox
No path exists where harness writes to .opencode/skills/ or .opencode/specs/

label: Strict single-writer enforcement: harness child can never scan while operator owns lease
evidence: cjs:848 — MK_CODE_INDEX_STRICT_SINGLE_WRITER defaults to true
cjs:850 — acquireOwnerLeaseFile() is the gate
cjs:851-864 — live owner -> acquired:false -> return BEFORE buildIfNeeded
cjs:944 — buildIfNeeded is the scan trigger; unreachable when owner lease held

reason: Zero graph-metadata.json writes in harness; harness writes only TSV, stderr logs, workload.json, all outside the .opencode/skills/specs/INDEX scan scope

direction: Harness child daemon reaches INDEX scan when operator daemon holds owner lease
reason: acquireOwnerLeaseFile returns acquired:false when owner lease live; child exits at cjs:864 before buildIfNeeded at cjs:944 — scan unreachable

direction: Harness indirectly triggers operator daemon graph-metadata writes via _sandbox file writes
reason: INDEX scan targets only .opencode/{skills,specs,agents,commands,plugins}; harness writes only to _sandbox/ which is outside scan scope

question: Is the ~1437 graph-metadata.json churn pre-existing + operator background rescans, NOT harness-produced?
answer: CONFIRMED. Harness writes no graph-metadata.json. Harness child daemon exits before scan when operator holds lease (cjs:864). Only the operator's own maintainer-mode daemon (SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE=true) performs INDEX scans that rewrite graph-metadata.json. The ~1437 modified files are pre-existing working-tree state plus operator daemon background rescans — attribution to harness is INCORRECT.
